summary: Frontend-only verification of MobileApp.jsx layout vs. reference image. Seeded localStorage (email/license/install_dismissed) -> mobile-app-screen visible. ALL critical layout requirements PASS: (a) big circular avatar mobile-ea-avatar-default present and roughly circular (bbox ~362 incl. scaled img / container = min(64vw,230px)); (b) mobile-ea-nameplate renders EA name in large blue tracking-tight text + 'Fully automated EA' subtitle; (c) action row mobile-action-pairs / -start / -info all present, icons carry inline style filter:drop-shadow(...); (d) 'Powered by LOYISO' pill visible with LOYISO in blue font-display; (e) 'Robot List' text label present; (f) mobile-robot-card shows EA name + 'Adaptive AI Trading' and mobile-robot-expiry is ABSENT; (g) bottom nav has exactly 2 cols mobile-nav-home + mobile-nav-connect, mobile-nav-settings is ABSENT. Regression: mobile-menu-settings still present inside drawer; Pairs drawer opens via mobile-action-pairs; Broker drawer/form/approved-card opens via mobile-nav-connect. Chart background: mobile-chart-bg svg present with class 'absolute inset-0 w-full h-full pointer-events-none', parent position=absolute, behind z-10 foreground content. Responsive: desktop 1920 shows vertical side tickers 'EA-CENTRAL · MOBILE EA' and 'LIVE · TRADING · BRIDGE'; tablet 768 keeps phone frame centered (x=197, width=374 in 768 viewport => centered). Layout visually matches the reference image (large circular neon avatar -> nameplate -> action row -> LOYISO pill -> Robot List -> Robot card -> Broker bridge -> 2-col bottom nav, all on faint candlestick chart background).

issues: Minor: default ROBOT_IMG asset has the words 'EA-CENTRAL' and 'Fully automated EA' baked into the image bottom which becomes visible underneath the EA nameplate due to the 64vw avatar size + scale(1.6) + objectPosition 50% 32% — this is the image content itself, not a duplicate React node, but it visually competes with the real nameplate on small phone viewports. Consider a cleaner robot art OR cropping objectPosition further to hide baked-in text.

action_items: Optional: choose/crop a robot avatar asset without baked-in 'EA-CENTRAL / Fully automated EA' text so the real nameplate is the only one visible.
Per request: re-unbind license_keys.bound_device_id=null for EAC-2F9D-E69F-6F75-CEB3 after this test cycle (NOT done here — no DB write performed by testing agent).
critical_code_review_comments: MobileApp.jsx is 1521 lines — exceeds the 700-line guideline; should be split into smaller modules (e.g., ChartBackground, ActionBtn/NavBtn, drawers) for maintainability.
All required data-testids in place; foreground content correctly uses z-10 above absolute chart background layer.
ActionBtn/NavBtn icons correctly apply filter:drop-shadow inline-style — matches reference image glow.
seed_data_creation: Only localStorage seed (ea_mobile_email, ea_mobile_license, ea_mobile_install_dismissed). No DB writes. License remains in its prior bound state — main agent should re-run the unbind step as noted.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Reference image layout is now implemented and verified in MobileApp.jsx. Critical testids: mobile-ea-avatar / mobile-ea-avatar-default (~64vw circle), mobile-ea-nameplate (name + 'Fully automated EA'), mobile-action-pairs/start/info (3-col), Powered by LOYISO pill, 'Robot List' label, mobile-robot-card (Adaptive AI Trading, NO expiry), mobile-nav-home + mobile-nav-connect (2-col only). REMOVED: mobile-nav-settings (now in menu drawer as mobile-menu-settings), mobile-robot-expiry, mobile-ea-avatar-chip. Chart bg: mobile-chart-bg with absolute inset-0 behind z-10 foreground. Side tickers visible at >=1920.
